claim: Negative example: for 4096 batched 16x16x16 FP32 GEMMs on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, the shared-memory seed measured 0.250000x the baseline speed using HIP-event timing only, so it did not improve performance.
expected_profiler_signals: shared-memory staging overhead dominating tiny matrices
lower matrices per second for the optimized seed
library baseline required before broader GEMM claims
curation_note: negative example, timing-only: correctness passed, but the custom shared-memory seed is slower for this tiny batched shape. No rocprofiler/rocprof counters or hipBLAS/rocBLAS, hipBLASLt, Composable Kernel, Triton, or framework baseline is attached.
